calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b/MECH-263 trained-OFC-head behavioural conversion on MECH-448 F->eligibility demotion-enabled E3 selector (485h-successor; commitment_closure:GAP-8)
items.note: V3-EXQ-485i SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-485h (RAN FAIL / non_contributory 2026-06-19 = the MECH-439 F-dominance conversion-ceiling signature: a genuinely-trained OFC head produced a real cross-candidate bias RANGE ~0.50 with ZERO behavioural conversion). commitment_closure:GAP-8 trained-OFC-head behavioural falsifier (SD-033b devaluation sensitivity + task-role discrimination = MECH-263 signatures a+b). WHY NOW: the 2026-06-21 governance cycle promoted MECH-448 (ARC-107 rank-preserving F->eligibility demotion) to provisional on the V3-EXQ-689d PASS, operationally LIFTING the shared MECH-439 F-dominance conversion ceiling (F ~88-89%% of committed-selection variance, V3-EXQ-571) that 485h's behavioural DVs were stuck under; the substrate-ceiling audit (scripts/check_substrate_ceiling_audit.py) flags SD-033b/MECH-263 ceiling-may-have-lifted. THE GAP-8 SIBLING of V3-EXQ-654h (which carries the SAME demotion lever onto the GAP-B arc_062 composite): 485i is the first GAP-8 confirmation the lever converts the OFC valuation channel. KEY HARNESS CHANGE vs 485h: the PRIMARY DVs (names unchanged: C1 devaluation_selection_shift, C2 between-context TV) are re-targeted from 485h's ISOLATED OFC softmax (F not in the loop) to the COMMITTED selection through the REAL E3.select() (SelectionResult.selected_index) with the OFC bias passed as score_bias -- where F dominates and where MECH-448 demotes it to eligibility, letting the OFC channel arbitrate the committed action with F removed from the final argmin (EVAL_COMMIT_THRESHOLD forces the deterministic argmin-within-eligible path). 3-arm dissociation attributes conversion to the CONJUNCTION trained-head AND demotion: ARM_0_frozen_demotion_on (silence control) / ARM_1_trained_demotion_off (F-dominance ceiling control = the 485h regime) / ARM_2_trained_demotion_on (use_f_eligibility_demotion=True + f_eligibility_envelope_floor=0.30 + f_eligibility_dn_sigma=0.0 = the V3-EXQ-689d ARM_ON config; the test). READINESS / non-vacuity (self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a weakens): ARM_2 OFC bias cross-candidate RANGE > 0.05 (same statistic the DVs route on) AND head trained (weight-delta > 1e-3) AND MECH-448 NON-DEGENERACY f_eligibility_excluded_count>0 + demotion_active (F genuinely demoted on a divergent pool, not all-admit) on >=2/3 seeds. PRIMARY: C1 ARM_2 devaluation_selection_shift > 0.05 AND > ARM_1 ceiling + 0.05 (>=2/3 seeds); C2 ARM_2 between-context TV >= 0.05 AND separation_ratio >= 3.0 AND > ARM_1 + 0.05 (>=2/3 seeds); C3 ARM_0 silence (shift + between < 1e-9). THREE-branch NO-weakens routing: PASS (READINESS+C1+C2+C3) supports SD-033b/MECH-263 -> SD-033b candidate -> provisional behavioural evidence + contributes to closing behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-I; readiness-met-but-DVs-fail -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion (route /failure-autopsy / MECH-449 follow-on, an honest weakens); readiness-unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory). claim_ids=[SD-033b, MECH-263]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING by itself. Pinned ree-cloud-2 (cloud, not the Mac; prefer-cloud). py_compile + validate_experiments --strict (multi-arm arm_fingerprint met) + dry-run smoke (end-to-end all 3 arms; self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, no manifest leak -- emit_outcome dry_run relocation verified) + validate_queue all PASS. Rebased onto the DB-materialized origin queue after a phase3-queue snapshot race; durable ingress via POST /queue/add per Step 8.6.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B committed-class-entropy falsifier on MECH-448 F->eligibility demotion (654g-successor; demotion lever matched constant; sweep use_candidate_rule_field)
items.note: V3-EXQ-654h SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-654g (FAIL non_contributory 2026-06-19, the CRF lineage TERMINUS; label shared_selection_authority_conversion_ceiling_route_implement_substrate). 654g proved the CRF stack is DONE (C1 met) and wired the 569i top-k shortlist, yet C1 held while C2 (committed-class entropy lift) FAILED -- self-routing the shared selection-authority CONVERSION CEILING (behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A/GAP-I; MECH-439 F-dominance live root, F ~88-89%% of committed variance per V3-EXQ-571). 654h ports the 654g harness with the MECH-448 (ARC-107) RANK-PRESERVING F->ELIGIBILITY DEMOTION lever ARMED as a matched-stack CONSTANT on BOTH arms (use_f_eligibility_demotion=True + f_eligibility_envelope_floor=0.30 + f_eligibility_dn_sigma=0.0); per e3_selector.py the f_demotion mode TAKES PRECEDENCE over the retained 569i top_k keys (eligible set = graded DN envelope, F removed from the final argmin; the within-eligible _modulatory_accum arbitration is identical) = the V3-EXQ-689d ARM_ON config. The 2026-06-21 governance cycle promoted MECH-448 to provisional on the V3-EXQ-689d PASS (committed entropy 0.938 vs ARM_OFF hard-top-k 0.371; all 4 load-bearing criteria met), operationally LIFTING the F-dominance conversion ceiling 654g's C2 was stuck under; the substrate-ceiling audit (scripts/check_substrate_ceiling_audit.py) flags MECH-309/ARC-062 ceiling-may-have-lifted. 654h is the FIRST downstream confirmation the demotion lever generalises off the GAP-A foraging substrate onto the GAP-B rule-apprehension composite. ONLY swept variable = use_candidate_rule_field (ARM_OFF legacy collapsed rule_state vs ARM_ON matured+active differentiated crf_source); the now-working CRF stack (crf_persist + 666c maintenance + CRF-gate amend) + candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward + SP-CEM + 643a authority + route-range + MECH-341 + SD-056 + GAP-D-trained SD-033a bias head are matched constants. PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy ARM_ON strict-above-by-margin ARM_OFF (>=2/3 seeds). C1 (non-vacuity, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue): class axis exercisable + GAP-A divergence (both arms) + ARM_ON matured (crf_frac_active>=0.30) + propagation non-vacuous + the MECH-448 demotion lever LIVE (active>=0.8 of P2 ticks AND excluded_count>0 on the divergent pool, both arms). THREE-branch NO-weakens routing: PASS (C1+C2) supports MECH-309/ARC-062 + closes GAP-I; C1-holds-C2-fails -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion (route MECH-449 Go/No-Go follow-on / V4); C1-fails -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-309, ARC-062]; experiment_purpose=evidence; PROMOTES NOTHING by itself. machine_affinity 'any' (was ree-cloud-3; broadened 2026-06-21 per user -- Mac runner turned OFF so 'any' routes to a cloud worker (cloud-1/3/4); resilient to the cloud-2-offline/cloud-3 churn). py_compile + validate_experiments --strict (multi-arm fingerprint met) + dry-run smoke (end-to-end both arms; self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, no manifest leak) + validate_queue all PASS. Working-tree-vs-HEAD audit (WT==HEAD) + post-commit dropped-file check applied per Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).

items.title: rung-6 natural-commit-occupancy-release de-commit falsifier + natural-commit LATCH-HOLD amend (460i-successor; gate-3 sustained-hold redesign)
items.note: V3-EXQ-460j SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-460i. The rung-6 de-commit falsifier re-run with the natural-commit LATCH-HOLD substrate amend (use_natural_commit_latch_hold, landed today via /implement-substrate; agent.py + config.py) ARMED in ALL arms so the ARM_LEVER_OFF baseline SUSTAINS a natural-commit beta latch BY CONSTRUCTION, plus the gate-3 redesign the user-adjudicated failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-460i_2026-06-21 (Option B) prescribed. 460i fired ZERO releases + self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at gate 3: the lever was correctly ARMED but the 460h sustained ~2400-step monolithic natural-commit hold did not reproduce -- the active SD-034 de-commit control-plane fragmented the latch to ~1-tick blips EVEN WITH THE LEVER OFF, and gate-3's mean_beta_elevated_steps proxy was BLIND to sustained-vs-fragmented. The latch-hold re-asserts the natural-commit-armed beta latch against the churn (YIELDS to the closure de-commit / MECH-091 threat / the rung-6 release, so the MECH-446 occupancy-drop DV stays measurable). NEW readiness gate 3 (REDESIGN): ARM_LEVER_OFF mean per-commit hold length total_beta_elevated/max(1,beta_release_events) >= SUSTAINED_HOLD_MEAN_FLOOR (5.0; 460i OFF was ~1.0) on >=2/3 guard seeds CERTIFIES the sustained regime is present (+ max_consecutive_beta_run + ncl_hold_reassert_total reported) BEFORE gate 4 (lever fired ncur_n_releases_total>0 + >= LEVER_OCC_DROP_FRAC occupancy drop vs OFF on ARM_GAP_SCALED) + the CO_OCCURRENCE DV. 4 eval arms (one trained substrate/seed, lever toggled at eval via clone; hold armed in all): ARM_LEVER_OFF (sustained reference) / ARM_GAP_SCALED (graded urgency, PRIMARY) / ARM_FLAT_RATE (D1 fixed-refractory control) / ARM_ACTION_EXTENT (Jin). Seven readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet (NEVER a false weakens; incl the new sustained-hold gate). PASS = MECH-445 commit-intent + MECH-446 within-arm occupancy-drop co-occur on >=2/3 seeds (dissolves the 460h disjoint-certifier problem). claim_ids=[MECH-446 scored, MECH-445 commit-intent precondition]; MECH-446/445 stay candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate (PROMOTES NOTHING; governance applies). Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i. Pinned ree-cloud-2 (cloud, not the Mac) per the duration/affinity lesson; 460-lineage runs on cloud. validate_experiments --strict PASS; dry-run smoke PASS (end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at the new gate-3 at toy budget as designed, no manifest written). Working-tree-vs-HEAD audit (WT==HEAD) + post-commit dropped-file check applied per Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).

items.note: Substrate-landing RETEST of substrate_ceiling MECH-309+ARC-062 on the now-implemented modulatory-bias/rule-apprehension channel; supersedes V3-EXQ-654g (non_contributory 2026-06-19). Single-var ARM_OFF (collapsed rule_state) vs ARM_ON (matured differentiated crf_source) on the 569i top-k shortlist conversion stack; PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy vs ARM_OFF AND proposer first-action dist. ENTANGLEMENT: residual ceiling IS the shared MECH-439 F-dominance conversion ceiling, MID-BUILD (MECH-448 lever landed 2026-06-20; falsifier V3-EXQ-689d queued); 695 keeps ALL 689-family levers OFF on every arm, distinct from 689d, priority<689-cluster so the build runs first (sequence after 689d per agent caveat). SAME-STATISTIC P0 gate (R5 ARM_ON modulatory_channel_route_range>floor, the route-range stat the conversion authority routes on; +R1 class-axis/R2 e2-div/R3 matured pool/R4 propagation) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue; three branches, no weakens: PASS(supports)/readiness-holds-C2-fail(F-dominance ceiling, /implement-substrate)/readiness-fail(re-queue). Queued via /governance ceiling-audit may-have-lifted routing 2026-06-20.

items.note: Substrate-landing retest of SD-033b+MECH-263 substrate_ceiling: does the trained OFC-analog specific-outcome-prediction channel lift the previously-ceiling'd behavioural devaluation+task-role-discrimination metric strictly above OFF + a frozen-head matched-noise control? 3-arm (ARM_0_OFF/ARM_1_ON/ARM_2_MATCHED_NOISE) x 3-seed, phased P0->P1(frozen-encoder head)->P2. ENTANGLEMENT: per substrate_queue f_dominance_conversion_ceiling the OFC channel is channel 1 and F-dominance channel 2 of an active conversion ceiling mid-build (MECH-448 lever; falsifier V3-EXQ-689d queued); a non-PASS most likely corroborates the conversion ceiling, NOT refutes OFC. SAME-STATISTIC P0 gate: self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_contributory (NEVER a SD-033b/MECH-263 weakens) if the trained-head bias cross-candidate RANGE is below the 0.05 floor (the stat the load-bearing DVs route on); a readiness-met C1-fail records devalued-state range + diagnostic live-E3 F-test for /failure-autopsy adjudication. priority<689-cluster. Queued via /governance ceiling-audit may-have-lifted routing 2026-06-20.

items.title: MECH-175 anticholinergic dual-pathway dementia risk (REM suppression + waking cholinergic deficit)
items.note: Tests MECH-175's dual-pathway hypothesis for anticholinergic dementia risk: (1) nocturnal REM suppression impairing MECH-123 precision recalibration, and (2) diurnal cholinergic deficit mimicry degrading attention/encoding. Four arms (N=3 seeds, K=5 sleep cycles): ARM_A normal (full sleep + normal encoding), ARM_B REM-suppressed only (nocturnal pathway), ARM_C waking-impaired only (diurnal pathway via 0.3x encoder lr analog), ARM_D dual pathway (both REM suppression + waking impairment). Key prediction: ARM_D shows ADDITIVE impairment (worse than either single pathway alone), supporting pathway independence. Metrics: context discrimination (slot differentiation), harm attribution. PASS requires main effect (normal > dual on both metrics) AND additivity evidence (dual < min(single pathways)). Proposal EXP-0199 (backlog EVB-0100). First experimental evidence for MECH-175 (currently lit_only). Queued 2026-06-21 via /queue-experiment skill (IGW-20260619-185, mismatch resolved: worktree incorrectly labeled ARC-050 but EXP-0199 is for MECH-175; ARC-050 requires unimplemented play mode). Smoke test PASS (manipulation checks met, script executes end-to-end).
